goals.description: Maintain physical proximity to cohort_3 for the next hour, offering only non-verbal cues of engagement (nodding, smiling) to signal reliability without demanding emotional reciprocity.

Since I am already late on the reading deadline and admitting weakness would feel like a breach of trust, maintaining a warm but low-effort presence protects the relationship dynamic while allowing me to avoid deep emotional labor or confrontation about my struggles.
